contact_intelligence._description: Every person ever seen in email, GHL, or Notion. Keyed by email address.

deal_intelligence._description: Every active deal learned from Notion tasks, email, and GHL. Keyed by property address.

sender_classification_registry._description: Every email sender ever encountered, classified by type and tier. Keyed by email address or domain.

learned_routing_rules._description: Routing preferences inferred from task patterns, Suggestions, and observed behavior. Never hardcoded.

active_pipeline_context._description: Current GHL pipeline state as of last read. Updated every run.
